english translation text:
Ziyarat of Syeda Fatima
Masooma e Qum (SA)

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the
All-merciful, the
All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text:
O Alláh bless
Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى آدَمَ صِفْوَةِ اللَّهِ السَّلاَمُ عَلَى نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ اللَّهِ‏
english translation text: Peace be on Adam, the Choice of Allah! Peace be on Noah, the Prophet of Allah,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىإِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ اللَّهِ‏
english translation text:
Peace be on Ibraheem,
the Friend of Allah,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى مُوسَى كَلِيمِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be on Mosa who spoke to Allah,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى عِيسَى رُوحِ اللَّهِ‏
english translation text:
Peace be on Isa,
the Spirit of Allah.

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَيْرَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Messenger of Allah, Peace be on you, O the best of the Mankind

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَفِيَّ اللَّهِ‏
english translation text:
Peace be on you,
O Choice of Allah!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ خَاتَمَ النَّبِيِّينَ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you. O Mohammed bin Abdullah, the last of the Prophets!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلِيَّ بْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَصِيَّ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Ali bin Abi Talib, Commander of the faithful and the Successor of the Messenger of Allah.

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا فَاطِمَةُ سَيِّدَةَ نِسَاءِ الْعَالَمِينَ‏
english translation text:
Peace be on you,
O Fatimah, the Leader of
the women of the worlds,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمَا يَا سِبْطَيْ نَبِيِّ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ سَيِّدَيْ شَبَابِ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O the grandsons of the Prophet of Mercy, and the leaders of the youth of Paradise

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَلِيَّ بْنَ الْحُسَيْنِ سَيِّدَ الْعَابِدِينَ وَ قُرَّةَ عَيْنِ النَّاظِرِينَ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Ali bin Husain, the leader of worshippers, O Coolness of investigating eyes,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ بَاقِرَ الْعِلْمِ بَعْدَ النَّبِيِ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Mohammed bin Ali, O the explorer of the knowledge

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا جَعْفَرَ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّادِقَ الْبَارَّ الْأَمِينَ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Jafar bin Mohammed, the truthful the benign, the trustworthy,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ الطَّاهِرَ الطُّهْرَ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Mosa bin Jafar, the pure, the purified,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَلِيَّ بْنَ مُوسَى الرِّضَا الْمُرْتَضَى‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Ali bin Mosa, the pleased, the gratified,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ التَّقِيَّ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Mohammed bin Ali, the pious one

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَلِيَّ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ النَّقِيَّ النَّاصِحَ الْأَمِينَ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O Ali bin Mohammed, the pure, the advising guardian, and the trustworthy

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حَسَنَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ ‏
english translation text: Peace be on Hasan bin Ali,

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَى الْوَصِيِّ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ‏
english translation text: Peace be on the successor after him

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى نُورِكَ وَ سِرَاجِكَ وَ وَلِيِّ وَلِيِّكَ وَ وَصِيِّ وَصِيِّكَ وَ حُجَّتِكَ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ‏
english translation text: O Allah, bless your light, the successor and vicegerent of Thy Messenger and Thy decisive argument over mankind

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ فَاطِمَةَ وَ خَدِيجَةَ
english translation text: Peace be on you, O daughter of the Messenger of Allah! Peace be on you, O, daughter of Fatimah and Khadeejah!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ الْحَسَنِ وَ الْحُسَيْنِ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O, daughter of the Commander of the faithful! Peace be on you, O, daughter of Hasan and Husain!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ وَلِيِّ اللَّهِ السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا أُخْتَ وَلِيِّ اللَّهِ السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا عَمَّةَ وَلِيِّ اللَّهِ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O, daughter of the vicegerent of Allah! Peace be on you, O, sister of the vicegerent of Allah! Peace be on you, O, Aunt of the vicegerent of Allah!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ وَ رَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهُ‏
english translation text: Peace be on you, O, daughter of Mosa bin Jafar! May Allah confer His Mercy and blessing on you!

arabic text: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكِ عَرَّفَ اللَّهُ بَيْنَنَا وَ بَيْنَكُمْ فِي الْجَنَّةِ
english translation text: Peace be on you May Allah grant us your companionship on the day of Judgment

arabic text: وَ حَشَرَنَا فِي زُمْرَتِكُمْ وَ أَوْرَدَنَا حَوْضَ نَبِيِّكُمْ وَ سَقَانَا بِكَأْسِ جَدِّكُمْ مِنْ يَدِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ‏
english translation text: and guide us to follow your footsteps and lead us to your grandfather's fountain andquench our thirst out of it, with Mohammed's own cup in Ali's hand,

arabic text: صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ أَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ أَنْ يُرِيَنَا فِيكُمُ السُّرُورَ وَ الْفَرَجَ‏
english translation text: Allah bless you All. I ask Allah to grant us, through you, happiness, ease and your companionship,

arabic text: وَ أَنْ يَجْمَعَنَا وَ إِيَّاكُمْ فِي زُمْرَةِ جَدِّكُمْ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ‏
english translation text: together with your grandfather on the day of Judgment

arabic text: وَ أَنْ لاَ يَسْلُبَنَا مَعْرِفَتَكُمْ إِنَّهُ وَلِيٌّ قَدِيرٌ
english translation text: and not to deprive us from understanding you. Indeed, He is Protector and Powerful on everything.

arabic text: أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَى اللَّهِ بِحُبِّكُمْ وَ الْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِكُمْ وَ التَّسْلِيمِ إِلَى اللَّهِ رَاضِياً بِهِ غَيْرَ مُنْكِرٍ وَ لاَ مُسْتَكْبِرٍ
english translation text: O Allah, I seek Thy nearness through my love for you, my enmity for your enemies and my surrender to Allah willingly, not arrogantly my acceptance,

arabic text: وَ عَلَى يَقِينِ مَا أَتَى بِهِ مُحَمَّدٌ وَ بِهِ رَاضٍ نَطْلُبُ بِذَلِكَ وَجْهَكَ يَا سَيِّدِي اللَّهُمَّ وَ رِضَاكَ وَ الدَّارَ الْآخِرَةِ
english translation text: with unshaken faith, what He communicated to Mohammed seeking in that Thy Face! Thy satisfaction, and the next world.

arabic text: يَا فَاطِمَةُ اشْفَعِي لِي فِي الْجَنَّةِ فَإِنَّ لَكِ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ شَأْناً مِنَ الشَّأْنِ‏
english translation text: O Master! Stand by us when Allah sits in judgment over us, O intimate of Allah,

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَخْتِمَ لِي بِالسَّعَادَةِ فَلاَ تَسْلُبْ مِنِّي مَا أَنَا فِيهِ‏
english translation text: O Allah, I ask Thee to make my ending happy, and not to take away what you have given me

arabic text: وَ لاَ حَوْلَ وَ لاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ‏
english translation text: There is neither might nor power but with Allah, the Great, the Exalted.

arabic text: اللَّهُمَّ اسْتَجِبْ لَنَا وَ تَقَبَّلْهُ بِكَرَمِكَ وَ عِزَّتِكَ وَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ وَ عَافِيَتِكَ‏
english translation text: So by Thy generosity, might Mercy and bounteousness, comply with our supplication,

arabic text: وَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ أَجْمَعِينَ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِين
english translation text: Allah, bless Mohammed, and his pious and pure Progeny and give them abundant peace! O the most Merciful of the Merciful.
